subcodes.first_line: O thou servant of God! In these days when the winds of tests and trials have encompassed the horizons of contingent being [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی در این ایام که اریاح افتتان و امتحان آفاق امکانرا احاطه نموده
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
